vaultType.description: Vault family for the `/v3/evk/vaults` EVK surface.

totalAssets.description: Raw underlying asset amount as a bigint string.

totalBorrows.description: Raw borrowed asset amount as a bigint string.

totalSupplyUsd.description: Market USD number for total supplied assets.

totalBorrowsUsd.description: Market USD number for total borrowed assets.

utilization.description: Utilization ratio number, computed from market-normalized totals.

supplyApy.description: Public supply APY as a percent number.

borrowApy.description: Public borrow APY as a percent number.
